clusters.hub_topic: Accounting Software for MSME and Startups
clusters.product_fit_rationale: Our product supports features like smart invoice management, automated tax calculations, and real-time payment tracking, which are essential for MSMEs and startups. The capability truth map highlights features such as gst_compliance, automatic_tax_calculations, and multi_payment_methods, which align with the needs of these businesses.
